76007.subject: When China’s open-source AI is a trap
76007.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzh9AAcAAAAABAXRgIFq8wXodoAuQIK5rzu8C38BXvou3am-xyMC6L4oju0OqMTj2aEStsaxZ_wHpNWqvR65Zv2U3JEDwso5vP1aizcZNG56o5yzjPxcud5U3Q 

July 15th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzh9AAcAAAAABAXRgIFrNCb_qmzBY1L2EyMNNb9WnkEe-NswNFbKn8jj7jVvHsGT4yyBgoydwu18sCw9h1ZPuprEIw8IKuh8ID3EeaqlNQgFGeNee097Twv85A 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzh9AAcAAAAABAXRgIFs-QvbqeYBnZTjdplIl_d544rLjqBnBpJ2xEPqV-WqxBmcMh8KdjxlRdcwdIRXTVA3wvxPjYvGFvPU6zgMrsJuWRscwfjD3vyw-mH4og 


 


 
 

Brooke Unger

Senior digital editor



 China gives the impression that its open-source artificial-intelligence models are more cuddly than America’s domineering proprietary ones.  And so everybody that is not America should adopt its technology. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzh9AAcAAAAABAXRgIFtPSzWOlMgLeQmx9qCBaAgmnI4kiuxPLGJ3rdd67aLN5oxENyShBHzRxoMP_XdtAPkVgflyNLPaPIDzD7US61JLgfe6NAXemk1 
Don’t be fooled , 
 warns The Telegram, our geopolitics column.


 If you’re planning to watch the World Cup semi-final between England and Argentina this evening, here’s some 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzh9AAcAAAAABAXRgIFuT_X3ngMTcfi0-xcDQwjwqyk3Ol9W0FJubtLQAhyLRNJtfsDb5nTc790FE3iOp94vsS2CdK8BqB9ak

76005.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest - July 15
76005.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-15-oleh-bezuhlyi-xdxkf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BTzBKMwlwTDeKLlkjfAi71g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1SpyhqmbNIKIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrma3ziv~so-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrma3ziv-so
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Cooling US producer inflation and MetaMask’s new yield product boost market sentiment. However, escalating Middle Eastern tensions and skepticism over Fed inflation metrics maintain a backdrop of high-risk volatility for Bitcoin and global markets. 📈US producer inflation cools more than expected in June, Bitcoin holds above $65K June producer inflation data came in lower than anticipated, fueling hopes for Federal Reserve rate cuts later this year. Bitcoin responded positively to the macroeconomic shift, maintaining support above the critical $65,000 level. Read full story 🚨US airstrikes on Iran escalate as Tehran threatens Strait of Hormuz blockade Heightened military tensions between the US and Iran have sparked fears of a global energy crisis and economic instability. A potential blockade in the Strait of Hormuz could trigger significant volatility across traditional and crypto markets. See details 💰MetaMask launches Money Account for self-custodial earning up to 4% APY Consensys-owned MetaMask has introduced a "Money Account" allowing users to earn yield while maintaining self-custody. This move simplifies decentralized finance participation, bridging the gap between traditional savings and DeFi spending. Read full story 🏛️Federal Reserve Chair Warsh says recent inflation data is an imperfect gauge of underlying price pressures Former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh cautioned that current inflation metrics may not fully capture underlying economic reality. His critique suggests a potential shift in Fed policy thinking, which could influence future interest rate trajectories. Read full story ⛓️Coinbase ends USDC support on Noble network effective August 17, 2026 Coinbase has announced the sunsetting of USDC support for the Noble network within the Cosmos ecosystem. This decision impacts liquidity management and forces users to reconsider their stablecoin strategies on inter-blockchain protocols. See details 💳Tether leads $7M round into Pact Labs to build payroll infrastructure on Aptos Stablecoin giant Tether is spearheading an investment into Pact Labs to develop regulated payroll solutions. The project aims to integrate blockchain-based payments into traditional corporate financial systems using the Aptos network. Read full story 🌐Surging volumes on Robinhood Chain could benefit Ethereum High transacti

75997.subject: Accelerating the Innovation Economy: Nasdaq’s Role in Building Next-Generation Industries
75997.body:
The Nasdaq Newsroom Monthly 

Автор: Nasdaq


Автор: Nasdaq

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/accelerating-innovation-economy-nasdaqs-role-building-next-generation-z59cc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BtfHsPIT4RNC9huBXltp21g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1tahoklM8hKIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrm6n3xg~gx-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrm6n3xg-gx
  
The global economy is undergoing a fundamental transformation. This month, we explore how Nasdaq provides the mission-critical infrastructure and ecosystem to power that growth.   Inside this Edition:  Capital Markets: Facilitating the largest IPO in history with SpaceX and how Nasdaq is scaling to support next-generation markets.   Economic Insights: The launch of a new research platform and convening the inaugural Nasdaq Texas Advisory Board to navigate industry inflection points.  Artificial Intelligence: How Nasdaq is operationalizing AI and Nasdaq Verafin is expanding their agentic AI workforce.  🔗 For News & Insights from Nasdaq all month long visit the Nasdaq Newsroom.    Nasdaq: The Foundation of the Innovation Economy  Nasdaq recently facilitated historic public offerings across the aerospace and AI sectors. For companies building next-generation industries, we deliver deep liquidity, a technology-focused investor base, and market infrastructure built to scale.  Transforming the Aerospace Economy: SpaceX Debuts on Nasdaq as the Largest IPO in History     In June 2026, SpaceX executed the largest initial public offering in history on the Nasdaq Stock Market, alongside a simultaneous dual-listing on Nasdaq Texas. This milestone accelerates the convergence of physical and digital infrastructure, funding a 164-country satellite broadband footprint that transforms global connectivity.  "Nasdaq is incredibly proud to be SpaceX's partner as it builds the physical and digital infrastructure of the future." — Adena Friedman, Chair and CEO, Nasdaq   Learn more.     Scaling AI Infrastructure: SK hynix Lists on Nasdaq  One of the leading AI memory companies SK hynix listed on Nasdaq in July 2026 marking the largest-ever U.S. share sale by a foreign enterprise. This signals a decisive shift in AI investment toward capital-intensive hardware. SK hynix is deploying proceeds directly into the physical infrastructure that next-generation AI demands.  "Global innovators use Nasdaq as an extension of their growth strategy to fund the massive infrastructure demands of tomorrow." — Nelson Griggs, President, Nasdaq  Learn more.     Mapping the Future Economy: Insights from Nasdaq   Data and execution are driving the next wave of financial innovation. This month, we quantify AI's economic impact and share a practical framework for operati
